description: Giyera reports the events of the failed rescue to the Hive, who reassures him that the Secret Warriors’ infiltration is not a total loss: one of their number is now secretly compromised. The mood between Giyera and Hive is darkly optimistic, laying foreshadowing for trouble ahead within S.H.I.E.L.D.

transcript.line: We lost them again and achieved nothing.
Not true. Now we have one on the inside.
